arts.ttl: Exeter City valuable point becomes brilliant - if they win on Tuesday - Devon Live
arts.sum: Exeter City manager Gary Caldwell said that Grecians’ point away to Wigan Athletic will prove to be a brilliant one – if they can claim all three points at Leyton Orient on Tuesday night. "I think it will prove to be a positive point if we go on to win our next game on Tuesday,” Caldwell said.

arts.ttl: Exeter City Women exit League Cup after defeat to Ipswich Town
arts.sum: The visitors started the second period strongly, Jess Sandland blocking a low cross before an effort on the turn drifted wide of Giles’ goal. Giles was alert to stop an Isabella Fisher drive in the opening minute, City’s backline caught from a long ball as the visitors started brightly.

arts.ttl: Wrexham injury update emerges regarding 22-year-old after Leyton Orient draw
arts.sum: Wrexham boss Phil Parkinson has said Max Cleworth has suffered ankle ligament damage. Wrexham will get the defender… The post Wrexham injury update emerges regarding 22-year-old after Leyton Orient draw appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
